hero.headline: *Real electricians* who show up when they say they will
hero.subheadline: You've already got our sticker in your breaker box — that's how Pensacola knows who to call when the power's out.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every wire, outlet, and panel
services_section.subheading: From aluminum rewires to surge protectors — we handle the jobs that keep your power flowing safely

services.title: Complete Home Rewiring
services.description: Aluminum to copper upgrades, full electrical overhauls. We'll strip it down to the studs and wire it right the first time.

services.title: Surge Protection Installation
services.description: Main panel and sub-panel surge protectors. Protect your appliances before the next Gulf Coast storm hits.

services.title: GFCI Outlet Repair
services.description: When outlets trip and won't reset, we track down the problem fast. No more extension cords running through the house.

services.title: Smoke Detector Installation
services.description: Code-compliant detector placement and wiring. We'll make sure every room is covered and connected properly.

about.heading: Nathaniel and the crew at Boots-on-the-Ground
about.body: We're the electricians leaving stickers in breaker boxes all over Pensacola because we want you to call us first when something goes wrong. Clean work, fair estimates, and we show up when we say we will. Been rewiring homes and fixing outlets in the Gulf Coast for years — your neighbors already know our work.

reviews.name: Richard V.
reviews.text: Nathaniel installed surge protectors with serious technical skill. Professional work, finished on time.

reviews.name: Clint H.
reviews.text: Incredibly professional and timely. Set expectations and then exceeded them. Highly recommend these guys.

reviews.name: Sly J.
reviews.text: GFCI outlet tripped, found their sticker in my breaker box and called. Quick response and fair pricing.

reviews.name: Hap V.
reviews.text: Complete aluminum to copper rewire six years ago. Outstanding job at a fair price, always clean and professional.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Greater Pensacola Area
service_areas.subheading: Licensed electrical contractors covering the Gulf Coast

cta.heading: Power problems don't wait — neither do we
cta.body: Fair estimates, clean work, and we answer the phone. That's how electrical service should be in Pensacola.
